## Available Themes

<!-- DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE DIRECTLY -->

With inbuilt themes, you can customize the look of the card without doing any manual customization.

Use `?theme=THEME_NAME` parameter like so:

```md
![Anurag's GitHub stats](https://github-readme-stats-orpin-xi-53.vercel.app/api?username=anuraghazra&theme=dark&show_icons=true)
```

## Stats

> These themes work with all five of our cards: Stats Card, Repo Card, Gist Card, Top Languages Card, and WakaTime Card.

| | | |
| :--: | :--: | :--: |
| `default` ![default][default] | `transparent` ![transparent][transparent] | `shadow_red` ![shadow_red][shadow_red] |
| `shadow_green` ![shadow_green][shadow_green] | `shadow_blue` ![shadow_blue][shadow_blue] | `dark` ![dark][dark] |
| `radical` ![radical][radical] | `merko` ![merko][merko] | `gruvbox` ![gruvbox][gruvbox] |
| `gruvbox_light` ![gruvbox_light][gruvbox_light] | `tokyonight` ![tokyonight][tokyonight] | `onedark` ![onedark][onedark] |
| `cobalt` ![cobalt][cobalt] | `synthwave` ![synthwave][synthwave] | `highcontrast` ![highcontrast][highcontrast] |
| `dracula` ![dracula][dracula] | `prussian` ![prussian][prussian] | `monokai` ![monokai][monokai] |
| `vue` ![vue][vue] | `nightowl` ![nightowl][nightowl] | `buefy` ![buefy][buefy] |
| `blue-green` ![blue-green][blue-green] | `algolia` ![algolia][algolia] | `great-gatsby` ![great-gatsby][great-gatsby] |
| `dracula_dark` ![dracula_dark][dracula_dark] | `nord` ![nord][nord] | `github_dark` ![github_dark][github_dark] |
| `github_dark_dimmed` ![github_dark_dimmed][github_dark_dimmed] | `aura` ![aura][aura] | `catppuccin_latte` ![catppuccin_latte][catppuccin_latte] |
| `catppuccin_mocha` ![catppuccin_mocha][catppuccin_mocha] | `ambient_gradient` ![ambient_gradient][ambient_gradient] | `apprentice` ![apprentice][apprentice] |
| `aura_dark` ![aura_dark][aura_dark] | `ayu-mirage` ![ayu-mirage][ayu-mirage] | `blue_navy` ![blue_navy][blue_navy] |
| `blueberry` ![blueberry][blueberry] | `calm` ![calm][calm] | `calm_pink` ![calm_pink][calm_pink] |
| `city_lights` ![city_lights][city_lights] | `cobalt2` ![cobalt2][cobalt2] | `codeSTACKr` ![codeSTACKr][codeSTACKr] |
| `date_night` ![date_night][date_night] | `discord_old_blurple` ![discord_old_blurple][discord_old_blurple] | `flag-india` ![flag-india][flag-india] |
| `holi` ![holi][holi] | `kacho_ga` ![kacho_ga][kacho_ga] | `maroongold` ![maroongold][maroongold] |
| `midnight-purple` ![midnight-purple][midnight-purple] | `moltack` ![moltack][moltack] | `neon` ![neon][neon] |
| `noctis_minimus` ![noctis_minimus][noctis_minimus] | `ocean_dark` ![ocean_dark][ocean_dark] | `omni` ![omni][omni] |
| `one_dark_pro` ![one_dark_pro][one_dark_pro] | `outrun` ![outrun][outrun] | `panda` ![panda][panda] |
| `rose` ![rose][rose] | `rose_pine` ![rose_pine][rose_pine] | `slateorange` ![slateorange][slateorange] |
